# `.github/` — AI coding assistant context

## The only current document

**[copilot-instructions.md](./copilot-instructions.md)** — single source of truth for the active **Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript** codebase (everything under `src/`). Auto-loaded by Copilot. Read this first and only.

## Legacy / stale (DO NOT FOLLOW)

The files below describe the **old vanilla-HTML/Python/Vercel-serverless** stack that was retired during the Next.js migration. They are kept for historical reference only. **Ignore them when working on the current codebase** — patterns, paths, commands, and conventions in these files are wrong for `src/`.

- `QUICKSTART.md`
- `PATTERNS.md`
- `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- `CHECKLISTS.md`
- `TROUBLESHOOTING.md`
- `SETUP_COMPLETE.md`

## Other things in this folder

- `workflows/` — GitHub Actions (Vercel deploy, sitemap rebuild, cache warming, quality checks). These ARE current.
